query:
SELECT c.id, c.isin, c.name, c."supplyChainRiskAnnual", scr."topSuppliers"
FROM companies c
LEFT JOIN "supplyChainRisks" scr ON scr."companyId" = c.id
WHERE c.isin = 'US1270971039';
